page.title: Admin
page.description: Manage shared bot access and offline testing controls.
page.noAccess: You do not have access to the admin dashboard.
page.botMismatch: Connected as {connected}. Expected {expected}. Reconnect to switch accounts.

states.offlineTestingFailed: Offline testing setting could not be updated.
states.botUpdateFailed: Bot account could not be updated.
states.chatSubscriptionCleanupFailed: Chat subscriptions could not be cleaned up.

requestIssues.label: Request issues total
requestIssues.description: Blocked, rejected, and error results across all request logs.

botChatChannels.label: Bot chat channels
botChatChannels.description: Channels that currently have a live bot chat subscription.

chatSubscriptions.label: Chat subscriptions
chatSubscriptions.description: Live Twitch chat subscriptions connected to the bot.

duplicateChatChannels.label: Duplicate chat channels
duplicateChatChannels.description: Channels that currently have more than one live chat subscription.

eventSub.title: Live bot subscriptions
eventSub.description: Shows the current Twitch chat subscriptions for the bot account so duplicate subscriptions are easy to spot.
eventSub.empty: No live bot chat subscriptions were found.
eventSub.duplicateWarning: More than one chat subscription is active for this channel.
eventSub.cleanupHelpCurrent: This cleanup removes stale subscriptions for the current callback URL only.
eventSub.cleanupHelpOther: This row only has other callback URLs. Current-callback cleanup will not remove them.

prototype.title: Playlist row prototype
prototype.description: Preview of a more condensed playlist item with always-visible song versions.
prototype.cardDescription: This preview uses the same playlist-item component as the live playlist page, with a demo song that has two versions.

logs.title: Request logs
logs.description: Newest request attempts across chat and viewer request flows. Each row shows the request, who sent it, the result, and any recorded match or reason.

audits.title: Audit records
audits.description: Newest admin and channel-management actions recorded for this channel. Each row shows what changed, who triggered it, and the key saved values.

requestLog.noMatchOrReason: No match or reason was recorded.
